info.name: Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan Module
info.description: API collection for Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan (Road Maintenance Type) module - Master data for types of road maintenance

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan jenis pemeliharaan with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan list retrieved",
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "jenis_pemeliharaan": "Rutin",
        "createdAt": "...",
        "updatedAt": "..."
      }
    ],
    "page": 1,
    "amount": 10,
    "total": 3,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

item.name: Get All Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan jenis pemeliharaan without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Get single jalan jenis pemeliharaan detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan detail retrieved",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis_pemeliharaan": "Rutin",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new jalan jenis pemeliharaan.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "jenis_pemeliharaan": "string" // Required - Nama jenis pemeliharaan
}
```

**Common Values**:
- "Rutin" (Routine Maintenance)
- "Periodik" (Periodic Maintenance)
- "Berkala" (Scheduled Maintenance)

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis_pemeliharaan": "Rutin",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create jenis pemeliharaan Periodik (Periodic Maintenance).

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing jalan jenis pemeliharaan.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,                // Required - ID to update
  "jenis_pemeliharaan": string // Optional - New jenis pemeliharaan name
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis_pemeliharaan": "Rutin (Updated)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Soft delete jalan jenis pemeliharaan.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Pemeliharaan deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Note**: This is a soft delete. The record will be marked as deleted but not removed from database.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
